ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of sensor */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the sensor is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "last_calibrated" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "model" TEXT /* The model of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* The manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* The serial number of the sensor */,
  "warranty_expiration" TEXT /* The date when the sensor's warranty expires */,
  "installation_notes" TEXT /* Notes or remarks about the installation process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_sensor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "measurement_units" TEXT /* The units of measurement for the sensor type */,
  "min_value" REAL /* The minimum value that the sensor can measure */,
  "max_value" REAL /* The maximum value that the sensor can measure */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* The accuracy of the sensor type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* The geographical coordinates of the location */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Notes on the environmental conditions at the location */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* The name of the contact person responsible for the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Voltage measured by the sensor */,
  "current" REAL /* Current measured by the sensor */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency measured by the sensor */,
  "kwh" REAL /* Energy consumption (kWh) measured by the sensor */,
  "hour_collected" INTEGER /* Hour of the day when the reading was collected */,
  "reading_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the reading was collected */,
  "temperature" REAL /* The temperature at the time of the reading */,
  "humidity" REAL /* The humidity at the time of the reading */,
  "ambient_light" REAL /* The ambient light level at the time of the reading */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments or notes about the reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., calibration, repair) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* The date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* The cost of the maintenance performed */,
  "maintenance_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the maintenance in minutes */,
  "maintenance_location" TEXT /* The location where the maintenance was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high voltage, low current) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* The severity level of the alert */,
  "alert_source" TEXT /* The source of the alert */,
  "alert_resolution" TEXT /* The resolution or action taken to address the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, manager, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_logout" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last logout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the user accessed the system */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* The type of device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, monthly, annual) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who generated the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* The format of the report */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* The size of the report file in bytes */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* A summary or abstract of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* The type of notification */,
  "priority" TEXT /* The priority level of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., error, info, warning) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the log entry was recorded */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* The source of the log entry */,
  "log_severity" TEXT /* The severity level of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_logs_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "config_key" TEXT /* Key of the configuration setting */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration setting */,
  "config_group" TEXT /* The group or category of the configuration setting */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* A more detailed description of the configuration setting */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)
